# Landbruks- og matdepartementet

*35 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Første Codicill og Tillæg til Grendse-Tractaten imellem Kongerigerne Norge og Sv](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) | Lappekodisillen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1751-10-02) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) |
| [Lov om avgrensing i retten til å sleppa hingstar, oksar, verar og geitebukkar på](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) | Hanndyrloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1970-03-06-5) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) |
| [Lov om bygdeallmenninger](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) | Bygdeallmenningsloven – bgdalml | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-06-19-59) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) |
| [Lov om dyrevelferd](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) | Dyrevelferdsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-06-19-97) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) · [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2009/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i konsesjonsloven (priskontroll på skogeiendommer, konsesjon ti](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-27.md) | Endringslov til konsesjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-06-27) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-06-27.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-06-27.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-06-27.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov om dyrevelferd (fremstilling og fremvisning m.m. av seksu](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2026-03-13-9.md) | Endringslov til lov om dyrevelferd | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2026-03-13-9) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2026-03-13-9.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2026-03-13-9.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i reindriftsloven (tilgjengeliggjøring av reintall og obligator](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) | Endringslov til reindriftsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-06-21-62) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) · [v2019](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2019/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) |
| [Lov om erstatning for naturskader (naturskadeerstatningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) | Naturskadeerstatningsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2014-08-15-59) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) · [v2014](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2014/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) |
| [Lov om fastsetjing og endring av eigedoms- og rettshøve på fast eigedom m.m. (jo](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) | Jordskiftelova – jskl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2013-06-21-100) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) · [v2013](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2013/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) |
| [Lov om forbud mot hold av pelsdyr](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) | Lov om forbud mot hold av pelsdyr | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-06-21-63) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) · [v2019](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2019/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) |
| [Lov om forebygging og reduksjon av matsvinn (matsvinnloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-103.md) | Matsvinnloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-103) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-103.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-103.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-103.md) |
| [Lov om forpakting [forpaktingslova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) | Forpaktingslova – fpl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1965-06-25-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) |
| [Lov om forskningsavgift på landbruksprodukter](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) | Lov om forskningsavgift i landbruket | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1970-06-26-74) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) |
| [Lov om forsvarlig hundehold (hundeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) | Hundeloven – hul | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-07-04-74) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) |
| [Lov om grannegjerde [grannegjerdelova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) | Grannegjerdelova – ggl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1961-05-05) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) |
| [Lov om husdyravl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) | Husdyravlsloven – avlsl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-12-04-130) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) |
| [Lov om jakt og fangst av vilt (viltloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) | Viltloven – viltl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1981-05-29-38) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) |
| [Lov om jakt, fangst og felling av vilt mv. (viltressursloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-102.md) | Viltressursloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-102) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-102.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-102.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-102.md) |
| [Lov om jord (jordlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) | Jordlova – jl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1995-05-12-23) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) |
| [Lov om konsesjon ved erverv av fast eiendom mv. (konsesjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) | Konsesjonsloven – konsl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-11-28-98) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) |
| [Lov om kornforvaltning m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) | Kornforvaltningsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2000-01-21-7) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) |
| [Lov om kvalitetskontroll med landbruksvarer m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) | Lov om kvalitetskontroll med landbruksvarer | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1932-06-17-6) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) |
| [Lov om odelsretten og åsetesretten (odelslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) | Odelslova – odl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1974-06-28-58) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) |
| [Lov om opphevelse av og endringer i gjeldende lovgivning om allmenninger m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) | Endringslov angående allmenninger m.v. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-06-19-61) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) |
| [Lov om planteforedlerrett (planteforedlerloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) | Planteforedlerloven – plfl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1993-03-12-32) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) |
| [Lov om regulering av svine- og fjørfeproduksjonen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) | Svine- og fjørfeproduksjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2004-01-16-5) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2004](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2004/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) |
| [Lov om reindrift (reindriftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) | Reindriftsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2007-06-15-40) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) · [v2007](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2007/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) |
| [Lov om reindrift i kommunene Meldal, Midtre Gauldal, Oppdal, Rennebu, Rindal, Su](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) | Trollheimenloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1984-12-21-101) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) |
| [Lov om skogbruk (skogbrukslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) | Skogbrukslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-05-27-31) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) |
| [Lov om skogsdrift m.v. i statsallmenningene](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) | Statsallmenningsloven – statsalml | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-06-19-60) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) |
| [Lov om svensk reinbeiting i Norge og norsk reinbeiting i Sverige (grensereinbeit](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) | Grensereinbeiteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1972-06-09-31) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) |
| [Lov om utnytting av rettar og lunnende m.m. i statsallmenningane (fjellova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) | Fjellova – fjell | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1975-06-06-31) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) |
| [Lov om veterinærer og annet dyrehelsepersonell [dyrehelsepersonelloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) | Dyrehelsepersonelloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2001-06-15-75) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) |
| [Lov om ymse beitespørsmål [beitelova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) | Beitelova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1961-06-16-12) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) |
| [Lov til å fremja umsetnaden av jordbruksvaror](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) | Lov til å fremja umsetnaden av jordbruksvaror | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1936-07-10-6) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) |
